title: Web Development
shortDescription: What makes Tenomad the best choice for your website development project? It’s a simple answer. You can’t afford to waste your investment for such a crucial aspect of your business by leaving it in the hands of amateurs.

title: Mobile App Development
shortDescription: Give your customers the opportunity to interact with your brand anywhere and anytime with a mobile solution from Tenomad. Whether your mobile solution needs a little push or a lot of hand holding, our mobile experts can provide valuable advice...

title: Dedicated Team
shortDescription: Hiring developers is expensive. The US Labor Department reports that the median wage for software developers in 2014 was $95,510. If you need to hire talented software developers, Tenomad has a more cost-effective solution.

title: Startups
shortDescription: Growth, traction, and expansion are always “top of the mind” among startup founders. However, small-business owners only have so much time and can quickly become overwhelmed by their efforts to grow a company.

title: Quality Assurance Software Testing
shortDescription: Your developers like to write code. Chances are good that they are not as passionate about testing the code that they produce. That’s where our team of highly trained Quality Assurance Leaders and their team of Software Testers can be of service.

title: Design
shortDescription: At Tenomad, we do not just make nice looking websites (although we’re good at that too!), we also focus on business success and brand credibility for our clients.

title: AI & NLP Consulting
shortDescription: Integrating conversational interfaces (Chatbots) to support customers, handle inquiries, automate requests, and understand text contexts.
